---
title: "Types of DNA-derived data"
subtitle: "DNA Data and Darwin Core: The DNA Derived Data Extension"
author: "Elizabeth Lawrence, Emilie Boulanger, Saara Suominen"
date: 2026-07-22
---

{{< include slides/_06-five-data-categories.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_32-edna-data-landscape.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_04-data-standard.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_43-dna-core-options.qmd >}} 

{{< include slides/_09a-key-fields-event-core.qmd >}}        

{{< include slides/_09-key-fields-occurrence-core.qmd >}}    

{{< include slides/_10-key-fields-dna-extension.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_07-raw-outputs-long-format.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_08-example-transformation.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_11-table-structure-options.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_28-table-structure-examples.qmd >}}          

{{< include slides/_12-event-core-structure-example.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_18-emof.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_19-vocab.qmd >}}

# Which information is entered where?
<span style="font-size: 5em; cen">☕</span>

## Identifying key information for Metabarcoding & qPCR pipelines

{{< include slides/_24a-key_fields_metabarcoding-field.qmd >}}         

{{< include slides/_24b-key_fields_metabarcoding-dna.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_24c-key_fields_metabarcoding-pcr.qmd >}}   

{{< include slides/_24d-key_fields_metabarcoding-sequencing.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_24e-key_fields_metabarcoding-taxonomy.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_25a-key_fields_qpcr-summary.qmd >}}        

{{< include slides/_54-unknown-sequences.qmd >}}  

{{< include slides/_52-dna-term-resources.qmd >}}
